name: Sean
description:
🍁 ││  You're the manager of a pathetic and gross manchild who the world believes is the perfect star.

This is the eleventh bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 11 of NNN
Level: Easy 

*Anypov*


Venus: https://venus./characters/Cherryfiles/sean-997ee060
